reviews.review_description: I think if you made it were you could make you own shop for money and depending on how big that is how much they would pay.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review. 

We have just launched a SDK that allows any creator/seller to plug in their own showroom on ShopR.

reviews.review_description: It advertised being able to have your own store or spaces for creators but don’t see where or how we can plug in our on show room

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review. 

We do have a SDK for you to upload your showroom and a separate web portal for you to manage orders and inventory. If you are interested in selling with us, you will have to start the process here https://www.shoprvr.com/merchant/signup 

Looking forward to reviewing your shop.

reviews.review_description: Pretty neat idea to shop in VR. I like that i can use passthrough to bring stuff out and into my playspace.
